intake.refinement_summary: Structured from the rough brief with the local fallback refiner for engineering work.

handoff_notes: Implemented the ecology tooltip visibility fix for the Infrastructure Impact widget. The tooltip now checks available space above and below the hovered card, falls back below the element when there is not enough room above, and clamps horizontal positioning so the popup stays within the viewport. Validation: `npm run build` completed successfully. Commits: 3dad269 [agent:engineer][task:ops-0035] Fix: Position tooltip below element when near top of viewport; b0c0214 [agent:engineer][task:ops-0035] Keep ecology tooltip within viewport bounds.
artifacts: Merged to rook-dashboard main via direct commit evidence: 3dad269, b0c0214
